text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer. I took care to rest
properly and recuperate, just like you said.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
There's a fitting maxim that says, "Resting is a
part of training." I feel like an entirely new person
after resting up. I'm brimming with energy!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Today's training is certain to yield valuable
results. Until then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It looks like Yaeno Muteki got plenty of rest!
